title: Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS Delhi

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS Delhi
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AIIMS Delhi. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Medical Officer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About AIIMS Delhi:
AIIMS Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
